hooks.command: [ -f .waymark/config.json ] && node -e "try { const c=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.waymark/config.json','utf8')); const open=c.openQuestions||0; const blockers=c.blockers||0; if(open>0||blockers>0) console.log('[waymark] Trail: ' + open + ' open question(s), ' + blockers + ' blocker(s). Run /waymark to review.'); } catch(e){}" 2>/dev/null || true
